title: Zero-divisor prime labelings family campaign
family_name: Prime labelings of zero-divisor graph families
strongest_honest_claim: The exact cluster now supports paired support-template reduction theorems for Γ(Z_p × Z_25) and Γ(Z_p × Z_p × Z_2); the remaining open work is arithmetic closure, with p = 11 the first decisive feeder and p = 13 the next tight follow-up.
paper_title_hint: Support-template reductions for prime labelings of selected zero-divisor graph families
